capabilities: Apply Event Sourcing to deterministic Knowledge DAGs using Key-Based Data Partitioning to optimize query pruning and ensure scalability.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts by applying domain-specific tooling to combine event logs and partitioned data, ensuring all operations are idempotent and consistent across partitions by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.

Assert merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on combined data; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.
Filter partition candidates by executing EXPLAIN ANALYZE on the top 10 slowest queries, identifying columns in WHERE clauses across >60% of queries.

Assign results using domain-specific tooling to categorize data into partitions, ensuring each partition's integrity by checking hash consistency across key fields using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; assert confidence_score >= 0.7 for all classified records.
Log operation duration and result code to an audit trail, ensuring operation_duration_ms < 500ms and result_valid = true for each operation.

summary: Integrate Event Sourcing with Key-Based Data Partitioning to enhance deterministic Knowledge DAGs, optimizing for scalable query pruning and efficient data management.
title: Event Sourcing

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merge omits NULL handling: records with NULL key fields are silently dropped, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Scalability issues when partitioning strategy does not align with query patterns, causing increased latency and resource consumption.
Data loss when event sourcing fails to capture all state changes, leading to incomplete Knowledge DAGs.
metrics: merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on combined data
